title: Ubiquiti PowerBeam 2AC-400, 2.4GHz MIMO, 18dBi
description: Incorporating a dish reflector design with proprietary airMAX® ac technology, the PowerBeam® AC is ideal for CPE deployments requiring maximum performance The PowerBeam® AC integrates a separate Wi-Fi radio for fast and easy setup using your mobile device Ubiquitiâs InnerFeed® technology integrates the radio into the feedhorn of an antenna, so there is no need for cables to connect the radio to the antenna. This improves performance because it eliminates cable losses Ubiquiti's airMAX® engine with custom IC dramatically improves TDMA latency and network scalability. The custom silicon provides hardware acceleration capabilities to the airMAX scheduler, to support the high data rates and dense modulation used in airMAX ac technology You only need one key for installation. Thanks to the button for releasing the radiator, its replacement is really easy. The holder allows elevation in the range of 20 ° up and down. Optionally available for purchase Device Dish antenna Rear housing Holder Gbit PoE power adapter Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 92 Maximum modulation 256 QAM Channel bandwidth [MHz] 10, 20, 40 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards airMAX ac Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 433 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 27 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 18 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 24V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 7,5 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Weight [g] 1795 Width [mm] 420 Height [mm] 420 Depth [mm] 289 Hardware CPU MIPS 74Kc CPU frequency [MHz] 560 RAM [MB] 64
